title: Cost Approach: The cost approach to property valuation is based on the...
summary: Describe the cost approach as valuation based on replacement cost minus depreciation.
prompt: The cost approach to property valuation is based on the current market value of similar properties.
solution: The cost approach values a property based on its replacement cost minus depreciation, rather than relying solely on current market values of similar properties. This approach is particularly useful for unique properties.
